author: jtraglia
content: Hey all, I've added some reference tests for phase0 gossip validation functions [here](https://github.com/ethereum/consensus-specs/pull/4902#issuecomment-4052059869). Please test them out if you're interested and report back 🙂

author: jtraglia
content:
Also, reminder that ethspec.tools is a thing 🙂 
https://ethspec.tools/#specs/v1.7.0-alpha.3/
